compiled_state.title: debug-everything and fix-bug must not close bugs with 'Escalated to user' reason — closing removes visibility, not escalates
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: P0 per user. Fix: debug-everything and fix-bug must comment on bugs (using ticket comment) when escalating to user instead of closing them. Closing removes the bug from visibility in 'ticket list' output. The correct action when a code fix is not possible is: (1) add investigation findings as a comment, (2) leave the ticket OPEN, (3) surface it in the session summary so the user knows it needs attention.
comments.author: Test
